The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues with four exciting matches on June 16, featuring some of football’s biggest stars. Lionel Messi ’s Argentina begin their title defense against Algeria, while Kylian Mbappe ’s France start their campaign against Senegal. Norway, led by Erling Haaland, also return to football’s biggest stage against Iraq after a long absence. Austria and Jordan will close out the day in another important group-stage clash.Here is the full schedule for today’s FIFA World Cup 2026 matches, including kick-off times and venues:Time: 12:30 a.m. ISTVenue: New York New Jersey Stadium, East RutherfordTime: 3:30 a.m. ISTVenue: Boston Stadium, FoxboroughTime: 6:30 a.m. ISTVenue: Kansas City Stadium, Kansas CityTime: 9:30 a.m. ISTVenue: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium, Santa ClaraFrance begin their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign against Senegal at New York New Jersey Stadium in East Rutherford. Kylian Mbappe will once again carry huge expectations after helping France reach the previous two World Cup finals. Senegal, led by Sadio Mane, are expected to provide a difficult test and will look to start their campaign with an upset.France:Mike Maignan, Jules Kounde, William Saliba, Dayot Upamecano, Theo Hernandez, Aurelien Tchouameni, Eduardo Camavinga, Antoine Griezmann, Ousmane Dembele, Kylian Mbappe, Marcus ThuramSenegal: Edouard Mendy, Youssouf Sabaly, Kalidou Koulibaly, Moussa Niakhate, Ismail Jakobs, Idrissa Gana Gueye, Nampalys Mendy, Ismaila Sarr, Iliman Ndiaye, Sadio Mane, Boulaye DiaFrance head into the tournament as one of the favorites after reaching the previous two World Cup finals.Mbappe will once again carry expectations for Les Bleus as they look to begin strongly at New York New Jersey Stadium in East Rutherford.Senegal, meanwhile, will depend on Sadio Mane’s experience and leadership. The African side has built a reputation for competing strongly in major tournaments and could challenge France.Kylian MbappeSadio ManeAntoine GriezmannFrance vs Senegal:France look stronger on paper and have more experience at the highest level, but Senegal have enough quality to stay competitive and make things difficult during key moments of the match.Norway return to the FIFA World Cup for the first time this century and much of the attention will be on Erling Haaland. The match against Iraq at Boston Stadium in Foxborough gives the striker a chance to make an immediate impact on football’s biggest stage. Iraq, meanwhile, are back in the tournament for the first time since 1986.Iraq: Jalal Hassan, Hussein Ali, Ali Faez, Ammar Mohammed, Ali Adnan, Osama Rashid, Mohammad Qasim, Ibrahim Bayesh, Sherko Karim, Ali Jasim, Aymen HusseinNorway: Orjan Nyland, Julian Ryerson, Kristoffer Ajer, Stefan Strandberg, David Moller Wolfe, Sander Berge, Odegaard, Morten Thorsby, Oscar Bobb, Erling Haaland, Alexander SorlothNorway return to the FIFA World Cup for the first time this century, with Erling Haaland finally ready to make his tournament debut. The match against Iraq will take place at Boston Stadium in Foxborough.Iraq are back in the World Cup for the first time since 1986 and will hope striker Aymen Hussein can make an impact against a strong Norwegian side.Erling HaalandMartin OdegaardAymen HusseinIraq vs Norway:Norway appear better placed to begin with a win, especially with Erling Haaland leading the attack, while Iraq may struggle to deal with the pressure and attacking movement.Argentina begin their title defense against Algeria at Kansas City Stadium in Kansas City, with Lionel Messi once again expected to lead from the front. Algeria enter the match with confidence and several experienced players who could challenge the defending champions.Argentina: Emiliano Martinez, Molina, Romero, Lisandro Martinez, Tagliafico, De Paul, Enzo Fernandez, Mac Allister, Messi, Julian Alvarez, Di MariaAlgeria: Mandrea, Atal, Mandi, Tougai, Ait-Nouri; Bennacer, Zerrouki, Feghouli, Mahrez, Gouiri, SlimaniDefending champions Argentina begin another World Cup journey with Lionel Messi still at the center of attention. Argentina face Algeria at Kansas City Stadium in Kansas City, hoping to avoid an early upset.Algeria arrive with confidence and a squad featuring several Europe-based players. Riyad Mahrez will be expected to lead the attack and create chances.Lionel MessiRiyad MahrezJulian AlvarezArgentina vs Algeria:Argentina are expected to control the game for long periods, and Lionel Messi’s experience could make the difference as the defending champions push for a confident opening result.Kylian Mbappe: France’s captain remains one of football’s biggest stars and will be expected to lead from the front.Erling Haaland: Norway’s striker finally gets his chance to play at a FIFA World Cup.Lionel Messi: The Argentina captain continues to guide the defending champions.Sadio Mane: Senegal’s experienced forward will play an important role against France.Riyad Mahrez: Algeria’s captain could be key if the team hopes to challenge Argentina.Fans in the United States can watch France vs Senegal, Iraq vs Norway, and Argentina vs Algeria live on Fox and Telemundo. Austria vs Jordan, taking place at San Francisco Bay Area Stadium in Santa Clara, will be available on FS1 and Telemundo.All matches will stream live on Fox One, while Peacock will provide Spanish-language streaming coverage.France and Argentina are favored to win their matches given they have better lineups and more experience. Norway are also tipped to start with a win, particularly with Haaland up front.Austria might get some challenges against Jordan but they still look poised to open the competition with all three points.
Article Summary: Fifa world cup 2026 continues with four exciting matches on june 16. Lionel messi’s argentina begin their title defense against algeria. Kylian mbappe ’s france start their campaign against senegal. Norway, led by erling haaland, also return to football”s biggest stage against iraq.

Article Title: Smriti Mandhana lone Indian in TIME's list of 100 most influential people in sports
Article Text:
Smriti Mandhana (Pic credit: BCCI)

Mandhana's remarkable rise earns global recognition



Poll What aspect of Smriti Mandhana's career resonates with you the most? Her record-breaking performances Her leadership qualities

NEW DELHI: India vice-captain Smriti Mandhana has earned another prestigious honour after being named in TIME magazine's list of the 100 Most Influential People in Sports 2026, emerging as the only Indian to feature among a star-studded global lineup.The annual list recognises athletes, coaches, investors and advocates who are "shaping sports today". Basketball legend LeBron James headlines this year's edition, which also includes football icons Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo , tennis sensation Carlos Alcaraz, golfer Rory McIlroy, skier Eileen Gu, NBA star Victor Wembanyama and FIFA president Gianni Infantino.South Africa captain Temba Bavuma and New York Knicks guard Jalen Brunson are also among the notable names on the list.TIME highlighted Mandhana's remarkable achievements, describing how "records keep tumbling in" for the Mumbai-born opener.The 29-year-old became the first Indian woman to score a double century in a domestic one-day game and the first batter from the country to register centuries in all three international formats. She is also the joint holder of the record for the most centuries in women's international cricket, with 17.Mandhana was also the first woman to score more than 1,000 ODI runs in a calendar year.However, TIME noted that the left-handed batter takes the greatest pride in the team successes she has helped achieve.Mandhana captained Royal Challengers Bengaluru to Women's Premier League titles in 2024 and 2026, while also serving as vice-captain during India's victorious ICC Women's ODI World Cup campaign last year, finishing as the tournament's second-highest run-scorer.Her extraordinary consistency saw her set a record for the most international runs by a woman across formats in 2024 before surpassing her own mark in 2025, a feat that contributed to her being named the BBC Indian Sportswoman of the Year.The latest honour places Mandhana in elite company and further underlines her growing stature as one of the most influential figures in world sport and the leading face of Indian women's cricket.
Article Summary: India vice-captain smriti mandhana named in time magazine's list of the 100 most influential people in sports 2026. Lebron james headlines this year's edition, which also includes football icons lionel messi and cristiano ronaldo. South africa captain temba bavuma and new york knicks guard jalen brunson are also among the notable names.

Article Title: Will Vaibhav Sooryavanshi face ICC action? What the Code of Conduct says after pushing Sri Lanka A player
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi

What exactly happened after the match?



WATCH:

What does the ICC Code of Conduct say?



(i) the context of the particular situation, including, without limitation, whether the contact was deliberate (i.e. intentional), reckless, negligent, and/or avoidable

(ii) the force of the contact

(iii) any resulting injury to the person with whom contact was made

(iv) the person with whom contact was made





What punishment could Sooryavanshi face?



A fine of up to 50 per cent of the player's match fee.

One or two demerit points on the player's disciplinary record.

An official reprimand or warning in less serious cases.

NEW DELHI: Teenage batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi could find himself under scrutiny after an ugly post-match altercation with a Sri Lanka A player overshadowed India's dramatic Super Over defeat in the tri-series clash.The 15-year-old prodigy, who has emerged as one of India's brightest young stars, was involved in a heated exchange that escalated into physical contact after Sri Lanka A sealed victory in the Super Over. The incident has raised questions over whether match referee Pradeep Jeyapragash will impose sanctions and what exactly the ICC Code of Conduct says in such cases.India A had managed only nine runs while chasing 17 in the Super Over, suffering their second successive defeat. Sooryavanshi, who faced the final three deliveries from slinger Kaguthas Mathulan, scored six runs, including a boundary, but was unable to take his side home.As the Sri Lankan players celebrated wildly, television cameras captured an agitated Sooryavanshi walking back alongside partner Suryansh Shedge. Moments later, the youngster suddenly charged towards Mathulan, seemingly reacting to something said by the bowler after successfully defending the target.Sri Lanka A player Vishen Halambage stepped in to diffuse the situation, but Sooryavanshi appeared to push him. Halambage also attempted to move towards the Indian batter before senior international Niroshan Dickwella intervened and prevented matters from escalating further.The teenager remained visibly frustrated as he headed back to the pavilion.Earlier in the evening, Sooryavanshi had also entered a lengthy discussion between captain Tilak Varma and the umpires over the Super Over regulations before head coach Hrishikesh Kanitkar pulled him away.The incident could potentially fall under Article 2.12 of the ICC Code of Conduct, which deals with "inappropriate physical contact with a Player, Player Support Personnel, Umpire, Match Referee or any other person during an International Match."According to the regulations, players can be found guilty if they deliberately, recklessly or negligently make physical contact by walking, running into or shouldering another player or official.The ICC assesses several factors while determining the seriousness of the offence, including:Article 2.12 is generally classified as a Level 1 offence, although the severity of the incident ultimately determines the punishment.Possible sanctions include:Accumulating four demerit points over a 24-month period can lead to suspension.As of now, it remains unclear whether match referee Pradeep Jeyapragash will issue formal sanctions or choose to let the matter pass with a warning.While emotions ran high after India's heartbreaking loss, the spotlight has now shifted from the Super Over drama to whether one of Indian cricket's most exciting young talents will face disciplinary consequences for his actions.
Article Summary: The 15-year-old was involved in a heated exchange that escalated into physical contact after sri lanka a sealed victory in the super over. The incident has raised questions over whether match referee pradeep jeyapragash will impose sanctions and what exactly the icc code of conduct says in such cases.

Article Title: How a stress fracture turned Gurnoor Brar into a tearaway quick
Article Text:
Gurnoor Brar (AP Photo)

Poll What impressed you the most about Gurnoor Brar's debut performance? His express pace His wicket-taking ability and control

One had to rub the eyes when Gurnoor Brar effortlessly clocked 148 kmph with his fourth delivery of his international career in the first ODI against Afghanistan on Saturday. The languid runup, the effortless delivery stride and the pronounced floaty outswingers coming down from six and a half feet can be lethally deceptive for a batter. And then when he got his first international wicket with a ball rearing up from a back of a length to Afghanistan opener Ibrahim Zadran, one couldn’t miss the coy smile on India’s bowling coach Morne Morkel ’s face. The sequence brought back memories of Morkel’s hay days in international cricket.As much as the 26-year-old Brar’s debut spell of 3/27 would have excited the cricket fans, it must have settled a few nerves in the national selection committee. The selection committee, led by Ajit Agarkar , identified as a long-format bowler a couple of years ago. The committee stuck its neck out in picking Brar for Afghanistan’s tour of India over domestic cricket’s sensation Auqib Nabi.The intriguing part in the Brar story is that he developed all these skills barely three years ago after he suffered a stress fracture in 2022. It’s important to note that he took up cricket only at the age of 17 at the insistence of his father, a policeman by profession in Punjab Police, so that he didn’t indulge in bad habits out of school. When the world was trapped in their homes during the Covid-19 pandemic in 2020, he sneakily went to coach Varinder Singh and started practicing at the Launching Pad academy in Mohali.“Gurnoor was around 20 when he came to me. He didn’t play junior cricket at the state level. He just wanted to grow and we used to practice sneakily during lockdown without letting anyone notice us. At that time, he could barely hit 135 kmph and always bowled back of a length,” Varinder told TOI.During the Sher-e-Punjab T20 league in 2022, Gurnoor suffered a stress fracture. Varinder has done formal courses on biomechanics from local universities and always maintained a data-driven approach in his academy. “We use all the sports devices and maintain data of our players in our academy—including sleep patterns and workload. When he broke down, I realised he needed to change his action to increase his pace and get the ball to swing. Earlier, he couldn’t swing the ball,” Varinder said.It’s not easy to change a bowling action at the age of 22 and especially when one is running out of time to make it to the senior level. The best thing about Gurnoor, according to Varinder, is that he ‘submits himself to his coaches’. “He said he was ready to do anything as long as it opened doors for higher level of cricket,” recalled Varinder.He then went on to add: “Even now, whatever feedback he gets from Ashish Nehra at Gujarat Titans and BCCI coaches, he blindly follows it. He didn’t get any matches for Titans but he didn’t get affected because the communication was clear from Nehra and the selectors. Nehra told him to strengthen his bowling muscles and we did that.”Back to the transformation process now. “He loved fried food even if he was working hard to burn it. But he decided to give it up. We drew up a diet, increasing his protein intake from natural resources. And then we got him to bowl more front-on besides changing his wrist position to get the ball swinging. His head used to fall in his leadup before the delivery. We got it straightened.“Those were three months of gruelling training before the domestic season. He started bowling at 145 kmph in another year,” the coach said proudly after watching his ward consistently bowling at 148 kmph on the international stage.“He can bowl above 150 kmph. Maybe he took it easy on his debut,” Varinder quipped.The selection panel and the team management have high hopes from Gurnoor. He has been a project that has been carefully handled. It’s time to ease him into the big league.
Article Summary: Gurnoor brar clocked 148 kmph with his fourth delivery of his international career in the first odi against afghanistan on saturday. The 26-year-old took up cricket only at the age of 17 at the insistence of his father, a policeman by profession in punjab police, so that he didn't indulge in bad habits out of school.

Article Title: Donald Trump set to break one of FIFA World Cup's strictest traditions after receiving green light for final ceremony role
Article Text:
President Trump held the FIFA World Cup trophy during an Oval Office ceremony and joked about keeping it

FIFA willing to give Trump freedom during trophy ceremony

Why did Donald Trump received the FIFA Peace Prize at the 2026 World Cup draw? (Image via Getty)

Club World Cup celebrations offered a preview

Trump's growing involvement with the World Cup

What FIFA's regulations actually say

United States President Donald Trump could once again find himself at the centre of a FIFA trophy presentation after reports emerged that football's governing body has no objection to him taking an unprecedented role during the 2026 World Cup final celebrations.Trump, who turned 80 on Sunday and is expected to attend the World Cup final at MetLife Stadium on July 19, has reportedly told FIFA that he would like to hand the World Cup trophy to the winning team. FIFA president Gianni Infantino has informed him that he has broad freedom regarding his involvement in the ceremony, leaving open the possibility of another departure from long-established World Cup presentation traditions. According to talkSPORT, Trump has informed FIFA that he would like to personally hand the trophy to the eventual champions, with the organisation having no objection to the move despite it representing a break from the traditional presentation format.The prospect has already generated attention because FIFA trophy ceremonies have historically followed a familiar structure. The World Cup trophy is usually displayed on a plinth before being carried onto the celebration podium by a member of the victorious team, most commonly the captain, who then presents it to teammates before the trophy lift takes place.Sources close to FIFA indicate that the organisation has no objection to Trump personally presenting the trophy if he wishes to do so. The same sources suggest FIFA will also leave it entirely to Trump's discretion whether he remains on stage with the winning players during the celebrations or steps aside to join other dignitaries and executives once the presentation has been completed.White House insiders reportedly believe Trump would be inclined to remain with the victorious team if given the opportunity. His schedule remains subject to change, and White House sources have not ruled out the possibility of him attending multiple matches during the tournament, but he is currently expected to be present for the final.The possibility of Trump remaining alongside the winners during the World Cup trophy lift is not without precedent.Last summer's FIFA Club World Cup final provided a glimpse of how such a scenario could unfold. After Chelsea defeated Paris Saint-Germain, Trump remained among the celebrating players during the trophy lift rather than immediately moving away from the podium.The unusual scene generated widespread discussion, with several Chelsea players appearing surprised by his presence during the celebrations. Cole Palmer was among those who appeared visibly confused as the president stood alongside the team during their moment of triumph.Sources close to FIFA say it will ultimately be Trump's decision whether he stands with the winners in a similar fashion at the World Cup final or joins other executives and dignitaries during the ceremony.The possibility of a similar moment unfolding at the World Cup final carries even greater significance given the scale of the tournament.The 23rd edition of the FIFA World Cup is the largest in the competition's history, featuring 48 teams, 104 matches and host venues spread across three countries and 16 cities in the United States, Mexico and Canada. All three host nations opened the tournament with positive results, adding to the excitement surrounding the competition.Trump has maintained a visible presence around FIFA events throughout the build-up to the tournament. He attended the official World Cup draw in Washington in December 2025, where he also received FIFA's Peace Prize, and has developed a close working relationship with FIFA president Gianni Infantino.Although Trump did not attend the United States men's national team's opening 4-1 victory over Paraguay due to a scheduling conflict in Washington, he remained engaged with the tournament. Ahead of the match, he personally called Mauricio Pochettino and the USMNT squad to offer his support and encouragement before their World Cup campaign began.His absence from the opener does not appear to have affected plans for the final. Reports continue to indicate that he is expected to attend the championship match at MetLife Stadium on July 19, where the eventual winners will lift football's most coveted prize.Despite suggestions that Trump's involvement would break FIFA rules, the governing body's official regulations do not explicitly dictate who must physically hand over the trophy during the ceremony.The regulations state: "The winner of the FIFA World Cup 26 will be presented with the FIFA World Cup Trophy ('Trophy'), which remains the property of FIFA. The winning team will be provided with the Trophy during an on-pitch ceremony immediately following the final whistle and will return it to FIFA in its dressing room immediately after the ceremonies of the final match and prior to its departure from the stadium."While the winners receive the trophy, they will also be awarded a souvenir plaque marking their participation. All 48 participating member associations will receive a plaque, while diplomas will be presented to the teams finishing first, second and third in the competition.Notably, the regulations do not specify the individual responsible for physically presenting the trophy to the champions.That distinction means the discussion centres more on tradition and protocol than on any formal breach of FIFA regulations.Whether Trump ultimately chooses to hand over the trophy, stand alongside the winners during the celebrations, or simply observe from the official party remains undecided. What appears increasingly likely, however, is that the 2026 World Cup final could produce another memorable moment involving the United States president and football's most famous trophy.
Article Summary: Donald trump is expected to attend the 2026 world cup final on july 19. He has reportedly told fifa that he would like to hand the trophy to the winning team. Fifa president gianni infantino has informed him that he has broad freedom regarding his involvement in the ceremony.

Article Title: Spain vs Cape Verde: Mikel Oyarzabal makes unwanted FIFA World Cup history despite La Roja’s dominance
Article Text:
Spain vs Cape Verde: Mikel Oyarzabal makes unwanted FIFA World Cup history despite La Roja’s dominance (Image via Getty)

Mikel Oyarzabal’s unusual World Cup record during Spain vs Cape Verde

Spain held by Cape Verde as Vozinha produces heroic goalkeeping display

Spain’s World Cup match against Cape Verde produced one of the strangest statistics in tournament history. Spain striker Mikel Oyarzabal did not touch the ball once during the opening 30 minutes, even though Spain controlled possession and created chance after chance. The Real Sociedad forward finally recorded his first touch in the 31st minute, becoming the first player on record to go the first half-hour of a World Cup match without a single touch of the ball.Spain spent most of the game attacking and kept Cape Verde pinned back for long periods. Yet Mikel Oyarzabal, who started as the lone striker, remained largely isolated despite his team seeing plenty of the ball.The statistic quickly caught attention online. One fan wrote: “My golden boot shout isn’t starting well.”Another said: “I didn’t believe this was even possible at all, imagine playing football for 30 minutes and not touching the ball once, must be surreal.”A third fan added: “This is lowkey the craziest stat I’ve ever heard.”What made the record even more surprising was Spain’s control of the match. La Roja finished with 74 percent possession and constantly pushed forward, but Oyarzabal was unable to get involved during the opening stages.While Spain dominated possession, they could not find a way past Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha. The match ended 0-0, giving Cape Verde a memorable point on their World Cup debut.Spain created opportunities throughout the contest and finished with 27 shots, but every time they looked close to scoring, Vozinha came up with an answer. The veteran goalkeeper made seven important saves and frustrated the European champions from start to finish.After the final whistle, emotions got the better of him as he was seen in tears following his standout performance. The result was a major achievement for Cape Verde, who defended with discipline throughout the game. They also conceded just one foul across the entire match, showing remarkable control under pressure.Spain will feel they left points behind after controlling so much of the game. Still, the night will also be remembered for Mikel Oyarzabal’s unwanted place in World Cup history, a record few expected to see in a match where Spain spent most of the evening on the attack.
Article Summary: Mikel oyarzabal is the first player to go the first half-hour of a world cup match without a single touch of the ball. The real sociedad striker did not touch the ball once during the opening 30 minutes, even though spain controlled possession and created chance after chance.

Article Title: Belgium vs Egypt FIFA World Cup Match Result: Belgium escape Egypt scare, avoid major upset after Lukaku's instant impact
Article Text:
Belgium's Romelu Lukaku (9) celebrates a goal with teammates during the World Cup Group G match against Egypt. (AP Photo)

Lukaku changes the game in just 23 seconds



Egypt threaten one of the biggest surprises



Veterans come to Belgium's rescue



Belgium narrowly avoided an embarrassing start to their FIFA World Cup campaign as Romelu Lukaku's immediate influence rescued a 1-1 draw against Egypt in a tense Group G encounter on Monday.With the Red Devils staring at a shock defeat, Lukaku came off the bench to spark an equaliser within 23 seconds of his introduction, helping Belgium survive a major upset in front of 66,775 spectators.The Napoli striker, returning from a hamstring injury that had sidelined him for much of the season, received a standing ovation from Belgium fans when he entered in the 66th minute. Moments later, he charged through the middle and stretched to meet a cross from the right. Egypt defender Mohamed Hany got to the ball first but inadvertently diverted it into his own net, cancelling out Egypt's earlier strike."He’s a target man," Belgium captain Youri Tielemans said. "He needs to build up his fitness, which is understandable after being out for the season. But, he helps us in this way."Belgium's escape prevented a repeat of the disastrous start that preceded their group-stage elimination at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.Egypt had looked the sharper side during the opening period and deservedly took the lead in the 19th minute through Emam Ashour, who capitalised on a defensive lapse to score his first international goal in his 30th appearance.The Pharaohs played with aggression and intensity, causing repeated problems for Belgium's defence and leaving coach Rudi Garcia's men fortunate to trail by only one goal at the break."The match shows we were closer to earning the win," Egypt coach Hossam Hassan said.Despite enjoying greater possession, Belgium lacked fluency and struggled to create clear openings. Kevin De Bruyne came closest before halftime with a shot that drifted wide and later rattled the left post in the 53rd minute.Lukaku himself nearly completed the turnaround late on, but his header sailed over the crossbar.The draw highlighted Belgium's continued dependence on experienced stars such as De Bruyne, Lukaku and goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois, all appearing in their fourth World Cup.Winger Jérémy Doku provided much of Belgium's attacking spark in the first half, but the side lacked urgency and movement."Our biggest challenge was about us," Tielemans admitted. "We lost too many balls, we weren't quick enough in transition, and when we had the ball, we didn't find the solutions. We were too static, especially in the first half."Coach Garcia echoed those concerns."We weren't really in the groove," Garcia said. "Technically, we left a lot to be desired."Only 20 per cent of Belgium's attempts were on target, leading Garcia to conclude that a solitary goal accurately reflected his side's performance.The Belgian manager nevertheless remains optimistic and even described Belgium and Egypt as the strongest sides in Group G, which also includes New Zealand and Iran.Attention now shifts to Sunday's clash against Iran, with Garcia making his expectations clear."We have to win against Iran," he said. "There's no two ways around it."
Article Summary: Belgium held to 1-1 draw by egypt in world cup group g match. Romelu lukaku scores equaliser within 23 seconds of his introduction. Egypt had taken the lead through emam ashour in the 19th minute. Coach rudi garcia's side now face iran on sunday.

Article Title: 150 kph and rising: Ashok Sharma gets India A call-up
Article Text:
Ashok Sharma (BCCI/IPL Photo)

TimesofIndia.com in Lucknow:

Poll What do you think is Ashok Sharma's main strength as a bowler? Express pace Variety of deliveries

A day after switching his domestic allegiance from Rajasthan to Gujarat, fast bowler Ashok Sharma has been drafted into the India A squad in Sri Lanka as an injury replacement. The 23-year-old pacer replaces injured Yudhvir Singh.Ashok will fly to Colombo on Tuesday morning before linking up with the squad in Dambulla, where the tri-series featuring India A, Sri Lanka A and Afghanistan A is being played.Led by Tilak Varma , India A suffered a narrow defeat against the hosts on Monday and will now face Afghanistan A in a must-win clash on June 17.Ashok grabbed attention during the Indian Premier League with his raw pace. He picked up six wickets in as many matches and is highly rated by the management of Gujarat Titans, who signed him for ?90 lakh at the auction.TimesofIndia.com understands that Ashok's ability to bowl at 150 kph while disguising a 115-kph slower delivery with the same action has particularly impressed Gujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill.The young speedster first burst into the spotlight with his express pace. He broke an 11-year-old record in the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy and finished as the tournament's leading wicket-taker with 22 wickets.Ashok secured his first IPL contract in 2022 when Kolkata Knight Riders signed him for ?55 lakh. He was later released and spent a season as a net bowler with Rajasthan Royals. At the 2025 mega auction, Rajasthan Royals bought him for his base price of ?30 lakh but released him again without giving him a game.Despite the setbacks, one thing remained constant: the advice he received from Australian captain Pat Cummins during his time with Kolkata Knight Riders."I never thought about slowing down. I just wanted to maintain my pace and hit the right lengths. In 2022, I spent a lot of time with Pat Cummins," Ashok had told TimesofIndia.com earlier this year."I spoke to him about lengths and what I could do better. He asked me a simple question: 'What is your strength?' Every bowler has one. Some swing it, some seam it. He asked me what I felt my strength was. I told him I could hit a hard length at good pace. He told me to stick to that. Whenever I practise, I remember his words. They still echo in my ears."Ashok now has an opportunity to impress the selectors with his pace and control in the India A setup. There is still no proper road connecting his village, Rampura, located about 35 kilometres from Jaipur, to the outside world. But the young fast bowler's journey is moving in the right direction, and he is edging closer to his destination.
Article Summary: Ashok sharma has been drafted into the india a squad in sri lanka as an injury replacement. The 23-year-old pacer replaces injured yudhvir singh. India a suffered a narrow defeat against the hosts on monday and will now face afghanistan a in a must-win clash on june 17.

NEW DELHI: The race for the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stage is beginning to take shape after the first round of matches for 32 teams across the first eight groups, with Monday producing a historic first in 68 years.A total of 16 matches have been played so far in the expanded 48-team tournament, while the remaining four groups are yet to begin their campaigns. Defending champions Argentina, alongside former winners France and England, are among the heavyweights still waiting to kick off their World Cup journeys.Monday witnessed an extraordinary sequence as all four matches ended without a winner, marking the first time since June 15, 1958, that a World Cup matchday featuring four games produced four draws.The day began with one of the biggest shocks of the tournament when debutants Cape Verde held European champions and world No. 2 Spain to a goalless draw in Atlanta.Belgium then escaped an upset against Egypt, with Romelu Lukaku's immediate impact helping the Red Devils secure a 1-1 draw after Emam Ashour had put the Pharaohs ahead.Uruguay also had to fight back from behind as Maximiliano Araújo struck late to rescue a 1-1 draw against Saudi Arabia in Miami.In the day's final game, Iran twice came from behind to earn a thrilling 2-2 draw against New Zealand at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.With only one game played by each side in the first eight groups, the standings remain tightly packed. However, the latest results have underlined that there are no easy matches at football's biggest stage.As the remaining groups prepare to get underway and giants such as Argentina, France and England enter the fray, the battle for places in the round of 32 promises to intensify in the coming days.
Article Summary: Iran's shahriyar moghanloo (20) battles for the ball with new zealand's finn surman (16) iran beat new zealand by eight wickets in their first test at tehran's imam ul-hussein stadium. Fifa world cup 2026 points table after iran vs new zealand match. Four draws in four games for iran and three for new zealand.

Article Title: 1 match, 7 saves, 5 million followers: How Cape Verde’s 40-year Vozinha stopped Spain and became World Cup’s most unlikely hero
Article Text:
Cabo Verde goalkeeper Vozinha, left, reacts after the World Cup Group H soccer match between Spain and Cape Verde in Atlanta, Monday, June 15, 2026. (AP Photo/Erik S. Lesser)

The man who stopped Spain

Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha (1) makes a save during the World Cup Group H soccer match between Spain and Cape Verde in Atlanta, Monday, June 15, 2026. (AP Photo/Mike Stewart)

Tears for family who could not be there

How 'Vozinha' became his identity

A career built through persistence

A dream realised at 40

Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha celebrates as holds the flag of his country after the World Cup Group H soccer match between Spain and Cape Verde in Atlanta, Monday, June 15, 2026. (AP Photo/Mike Stewart)

From 50,000 followers to millions

Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha struggled to contain his emotions as he stood before television cameras after the biggest match of his career, overwhelmed by a moment that had taken decades of perseverance, sacrifice and belief to reach.For 95 demanding minutes in Atlanta, the 40-year-old goalkeeper had resisted everything Spain could throw at him. By the time the final whistle confirmed a remarkable 0-0 draw against one of the favourites to win the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Cape Verde had secured the most significant result in its football history and Vozinha found himself reflecting on a journey that had begun far from the sport's grandest stage."The dream has come true," Vozinha said after receiving the Player of the Match award.Spain arrived in Atlanta carrying the expectations that naturally accompany one of international football's most decorated nations. The 2010 world champions and reigning European champions entered the tournament ranked second in the FIFA rankings and were widely viewed as genuine contenders to lift the trophy.The gulf between the two sides appeared obvious on paper and became equally apparent throughout much of the match itself.Spain dominated possession, controlled territory and spent extended periods attacking deep inside the Cape Verde half. Luis de la Fuente's side finished with 27 shots compared to Cape Verde's six, won 11 corners and completed more than 700 passes while fielding a squad packed with elite-level talent.Even Spain's substitutes highlighted the depth available to them. Players such as Lamine Yamal, Dani Olmo and Nico Williams would comfortably start for many teams competing at this World Cup, yet they were introduced from the bench as Spain searched desperately for a breakthrough.What Spain could not overcome, however, was Vozinha.The veteran goalkeeper produced seven crucial saves and repeatedly denied some of Europe's most accomplished attackers. Ferran Torres, Aymeric Laporte and several others found themselves frustrated by his positioning, composure and decision-making under constant pressure. When Yamal entered the match in the second half and immediately began creating dangerous situations with his dribbling and movement, Vozinha remained unshaken.Spain continued to create opportunities, but Cape Verde's goalkeeper consistently found answers.Former Scotland winger Pat Nevin later remarked that "Vozinha has lit up this game," and the statistics reinforced the significance of his performance. Among goalkeepers aged 40 or older, only Northern Ireland legend Pat Jennings, who made 10 saves against Brazil during the 1986 World Cup, has recorded more saves in a single World Cup match.For Cape Verde, a nation of approximately 530,000 people and the third-smallest country ever to qualify for a men's World Cup, the draw carried the emotional weight of a famous victory.As celebrations unfolded around Atlanta Stadium and supporters embraced one another in the stands, Vozinha's thoughts drifted away from football and towards the people who had shaped his life."I cried because I grew up with my grandparents," he said. "Unfortunately they were not here. They died a few years before. They were everything for me, everything for my life."And also because of my mum. She didn't manage to be here because of the visa. Because of the money you have to pay for the visa, we didn't manage on time. I would like her to be here."The emotional reaction resonated deeply because the story behind the name on the back of his shirt is inseparable from the grandparents he was remembering.Football supporters around the world became familiar with the name Vozinha during Cape Verde's World Cup debut, but the nickname has accompanied him for most of his life.Born Josimar José Evora Dias, the goalkeeper explained in a previous interview with FIFA that he spent much of his childhood being raised by his grandparents while his father served in the military and his mother worked. It was they who gave him the nickname "Vozinha", a Portuguese expression that roughly translates to "little voice"."The nickname is because of my grandparents. I grew up with them as my father was in the military and my mother was working," he explained.Although the nickname eventually became famous, he initially disliked it."Nobody in Cape Verde knew me by that name. But I didn't like it at first, it drove me crazy. But when I arrived in Angola, there was another goalkeeper named Josimar. So I said, 'I'm not going to put Josimar II on my shirt.' And if everyone knew me as Vozinha in Cape Verde, that's what was going to stick."Over time, the nickname became inseparable from his football identity. During the match against Spain, it also seemed particularly appropriate as he spent the entire evening directing teammates, organising defensive positions and constantly communicating with those in front of him.Vozinha's route to the World Cup was anything but straightforward. Raised in Mindelo on the island of São Vicente, he spent much of his childhood playing football against older boys in the streets and learning to compete in difficult circumstances."In my neighborhood, the boys were much older. And I always played in the street, getting beaten up a lot. Well, I was also very good with my feet, I was competitive and rebellious, I didn't like to lose. I took a lot of hits."Football opportunities in Cape Verde were limited, and even when he established himself as one of the most talented goalkeepers on his island, he encountered obstacles that threatened to halt his progress."I was one of the best keepers on my island, but I was small. Even when I performed well, I wasn't selected because of my height."Determined to continue pursuing a professional career, he eventually left Cape Verde and began a football journey that would take him across several countries. Over the years he represented clubs in Angola, Moldova, Cyprus, Slovakia and Portugal, building a reputation as a dependable goalkeeper while adapting to different leagues and cultures. He currently plays for Portuguese second-division side Chaves after representing nine clubs across five countries.His path was made even more unusual by the fact that professional football arrived relatively late."I started playing professional football when I was 25 years old, in 2012. It was too late for a person like me," he admitted.At various points he even considered stepping away from international football altogether."I thought about leaving the national team, but then I continued because of this dream."That dream finally became reality when Cape Verde stepped onto the World Cup stage for the first time.At 40 years and 12 days old, Vozinha became the oldest player ever to appear in a nation's World Cup debut match. Only Egypt's Essam El Hadary was older when making his own World Cup debut, placing the Cape Verde goalkeeper in rare historical company.Despite receiving individual recognition after the match, Vozinha repeatedly redirected praise towards his teammates and the collective effort that had secured the result."The performance is a performance for everyone. I am the man of the game, but this award is for all my colleagues, because without them, nothing is possible. And I will continue to work for the team and for the people.He also rejected the suggestion that Cape Verde had travelled to the tournament merely to enjoy the experience."Everyone thought that we came here just to enjoy the World Cup, but no. We know that we have teams that we will always respect, because this is our first time, but we are here to compete, and we are here to fight for our country."The draw leaves Cape Verde in a strong position heading into Group H fixtures against Uruguay on June 21 and Saudi Arabia on June 27, with a place in the knockout rounds now a realistic possibility.The impact of Vozinha's performance extended far beyond the stadium. Before the match against Spain, the goalkeeper had approximately 50,000 followers on Instagram. Within hours of his heroics, that figure had surged beyond five million after Brazilian broadcaster CazeTV encouraged viewers to follow the Cape Verde goalkeeper during its coverage.When reporters informed him about the extraordinary increase, his reaction reflected the disbelief felt by many watching his story unfold."That is crazy," he said.For a player who once worried that his height would prevent him from succeeding, who only became a professional at 25 and who spent years moving between countries in pursuit of opportunities, the sudden global attention represented another unexpected chapter in an already remarkable career.After frustrating Spain, preserving a historic clean sheet and helping Cape Verde secure the most memorable result the nation has ever produced on a football field, Vozinha ensured that millions of people around the world would remember both his performance and the extraordinary journey that brought him there.
Article Summary: Cape verde goalkeeper vozinha made seven crucial saves in 0-0 draw with spain. Only northern ireland legend pat jennings, who made 10 saves against brazil during the 1986 world cup, has recorded more saves in a single world cup match. Spain dominated possession, controlled territory and spent extended periods attacking deep inside the cape verde half.

Article Title: Iran vs New Zealand FIFA World Cup Match Result: Iran rally twice amid geopolitical turmoil to deny New Zealand
Article Text:
Iran's Mohammad Mohebbi (8) celebrates after scoring his side's second goal. (AP Photo)

New Zealand strike early but Iran hit back



Political backdrop overshadows campaign



Historic point for the All Whites



Iran showed resilience on and off the pitch as Team Melli twice fought back from behind to secure a 2-2 draw against New Zealand in a politically charged FIFA World Cup opener on Monday night.Mohammad Mohebbi's 64th-minute equaliser capped a spirited comeback by the Asian side, which has endured one of the most turbulent build-ups to the tournament following the war involving Iran, the United States and Israel.Playing before a passionate pro-Iranian crowd at SoFi Stadium near Los Angeles, Iran overcame deficits on two occasions to claim a point against a New Zealand side appearing at its first World Cup since 2010.The All Whites stunned the heavily Iranian crowd inside the stadium in just the seventh minute. Captain Chris Wood intercepted a goal kick and, after creating space in the final third, found Elijah Just, who volleyed brilliantly through traffic to hand New Zealand an early lead.Iran gradually settled and found a response in the 32nd minute through veteran defender Ramin Rezaeian. The right-back produced a moment of quality, delicately chipping the ball with the outside of his boot to bring Team Melli level.New Zealand regained the advantage nine minutes after the restart. Wood once again played provider, holding up possession before releasing Just, whose strike found its way through a crowded penalty area for his second goal of the night.But Iran refused to surrender. In the 64th minute, Rezaeian turned creator, delivering a precise long ball onto the head of Mohebbi, who made no mistake to restore parity.Both sides had opportunities to snatch victory, but neither could find a decisive third goal.Iran's seventh World Cup appearance has unfolded under extraordinary circumstances.Following the outbreak of war involving Iran, the United States and Israel on February 28, the Iranian federation even requested FIFA to relocate its group-stage matches outside the United States. That request was rejected, forcing the team to adapt its plans.Team Melli shifted its base from Arizona to Tijuana, Mexico, and has been flying into the United States only on the eve of matches before returning immediately after.Captain Mehdi Taremi admitted before the tournament that the World Cup had been robbed of much of the joy usually associated with football.The atmosphere around SoFi Stadium reflected those tensions. While several hundred Iranian-Americans protested against the government outside the venue, some supporters inside turned their backs during the national anthem. Once the match began, however, the overwhelming majority rallied behind the players.For New Zealand, the draw represented another memorable milestone.Ranked 85th in the world and the lowest-ranked team at the tournament, the All Whites matched the total number of goals they had scored across each of their previous two World Cup campaigns.Meanwhile, Iran, ranked 20th and appearing in a fourth consecutive World Cup, avoided defeat but remained in search of a breakthrough beyond the group stage.
Article Summary: Team melli twice fought back from behind to secure a 2-2 draw against new zealand in a politically charged fifa world cup opener on monday night. The all whites stunned the heavily iranian crowd inside the stadium in just the seventh minute. Elijah just volleyed brilliantly through traffic to give new zealand an early lead.

Article Title: “How can anyone trust FIFA?”: Fans brutally slam Federico Valverde’s Man of the Match award after Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay draw
Article Text:
Fede Valverde (Image via: IG/X)

Why football fans felt FIFA got the Man of the Match call wrong

Mohammed Al-Owais earns fan support after strong display for Saudi Arabia

Federico Valverde’s Man of the Match award after Uruguay’s 1-1 draw against Saudi Arabia at the 2026 FIFA World Cup quickly became a major talking point among football fans. While the midfielder earned praise for his effort in midfield, many supporters strongly disagreed with the decision to hand him the Michelob Ultra Superior Player of the Match award. Several fans believed Saudi Arabia goalkeeper Mohammed Al-Owais or defender Abdulelah Al-Amri deserved the honor after helping their side secure a valuable draw in the Group H opener.Shortly after Valverde was announced as the Michelob Ultra Superior Player of the Match, social media quickly filled with criticism. Many fans argued that Saudi Arabia goalkeeper Mohammed Al-Owais was the real difference-maker after producing a string of important saves to frustrate Uruguay throughout the match.Valverde, who captained Uruguay, remained active throughout the match and helped push the team forward as Uruguay searched for an equalizer. However, several supporters still felt his performance was not enough to justify the award.One fan openly questioned the decision and wrote, “Should have been Saudi Arabia's goalkeeper Mohammed Al-Owais.” Another supporter reacted harshly, saying, “You saw the injustice when Valverde was awarded Man of the Match in that game.He honestly did nothing, while Al-Owais and Al-Amri were better than him. How can anyone trust FIFA when they are not even fair with the Man of the Match award.”Several supporters also felt Valverde failed to make enough impact to deserve the recognition. One fan wrote, “Did Valverde deserve the best player award? He offered nothing. Do you see something we don't?” Another supporter criticized the decision and posted, “FIFA has lost all credibility. They favor Valverde and ignore the Saudi national team's goalkeeper!”While criticism toward the award continued, many supporters shifted attention to Saudi Arabia goalkeeper Mohammed Al-Owais, with several calling him the true star of the match after making crucial saves in Saudi Arabia’s 1-1 draw against Uruguay.One fan praised the goalkeeper and wrote, “The real player of that match was the Goalkeeper for Saudi Arabia! Big man was standing on his head and made at least 8 strong saves maybe more.” Another fan felt the decision was completely wrong and said, “Well this should have gone to Saudi's goalkeeper or Al-Amri for sure but this guy has absolutely stolen it.”Popular football account HolaFernando also joined the debate and wrote, “Nothing against Valverde but the superior player of the match was Saudi Arabia's goalkeeper. VERY impressive.” While Valverde picked up the official award, fan reaction online made one thing clear: many supporters believed Saudi Arabia’s standout performers were overlooked after a memorable World Cup display.
Article Summary: Uruguay midfielder federico valverde was awarded the michelob ultra superior player of the match after his side's 1-1 draw against saudi arabia. Many fans felt saudi arabia goalkeeper mohammed al-owais or defender abdulelah al-amri deserved the honor.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: Las Vegas Raiders and Washington Commanders turn into top landing spots for $4M New England Patriots' star
Article Text:
Las Vegas Raiders and Washington Commanders turn into top landing spots for $4M New England Patriots' star.(Image via X)

Category



Details



Player



Kayshon Boutte



Current Team



New England Patriots



Rumored Teams



Las Vegas Raiders, Washington Commanders



Contract Status



Final Year of Contract (Entering final year of his 4-year rookie deal)



Salary Cap Hit (New Team)



$3.67 Million (Acquiring team inherits his full remaining base salary)



Trade Likelihood



High (Driven by a crowded wide receiver room and his desire for a larger role)



Latest Insider Update



Actively seeking a trade after skipping voluntary OTAs but attending mandatory minicamp



Potential Return



Late Day 3 Draft Pick (Expected to return a 4th to 7th-round selection)





Which teams are interested in Kayshon Boutte?



What are insiders saying about the trade rumors?



Contract details and salary cap implications



How could the trade impact the teams?



The New England Patriots’ star player, Kayshon Boutte, has been actively looking to be traded from the team for the last few weeks. Amid all the mess, the Las Vegas Raiders and the Washington Commanders have emerged as potential landing spots for the star player.Over the last few weeks, while a number of teams have been linked to Kayshon Boutte, as per NFL insiders, the Las Vegas Raiders, the Washington Commanders seem to be interested in him.A few days ago, ESPN’s Dan Graziano noted in a recent report, “The 2023 sixth-round pick has just one year left on his contract at $3.674 million, and the acquisitions of A.J. Brown and Romeo Doubs might just make things too crowded in New England's wide receivers room.”ESPN’s Dan Graziano added, “The Patriots have received calls on Boutte and likely will continue to do so. And as always, unless and until we see a contract extension, we're justified in wondering whether the player is in the team's long-term plans. The Raiders and Commanders stand out as two teams that could still use help at wide receiver.”With the New England Patriots’ star player Kayshon Boutte entering the final year of his contract with the team, trading him will instantly clear off $3.6 million of his base salary off the team’s books.But the New England Patriots will be hit with a negligible dead cap charge of just $46,818.For the Las Vegas Raiders, trading for Kayshon Boutte would be relatively affordable for the team because of their available cap space.For the Washington Commanders, trading for Kayshon Boutte would also be cheap as the team is actively looking to upgrade a weaker wide receiver room.Trading for Kayshon Boutte allows them to pair him up with his former LSU college quarterback, Jayden Daniels, on a low-risk, one year trial.
Article Summary: Las vegas raiders and washington commanders turn into top landing spots for $4m new england patriots' star. Trading kayshon boutte will instantly clear off $3.6 million of his base salary off the team’s books. For the las vegas raiders, trading for boutte would be relatively affordable because of their available cap space.

Article Title: Aldon Smith’s net worth: Inside the fortune of the former 49ers pass-rushing star
Article Text:
Aldon Smith’s net worth: Inside the fortune of the former 49ers pass-rushing star (Image via Getty)



How Aldon Smith became one of the NFL’s top defensive players?

Aldon Smith’s contracts, salary and career earnings

San Francisco 49ers — $14,884,492

Oakland Raiders — $2,485,294

Dallas Cowboys — $2,000,000

Seattle Seahawks — $137,500

Legal troubles, comeback attempts and life after football

Former NFL star Aldon Smith had an estimated net worth of $5 million at the time of his death on June 13, 2026. He was 36 years old. The San Francisco 49ers confirmed his death, but no cause was immediately announced. Smith was once one of the NFL’s most feared pass rushers and earned millions during his career. However, repeated suspensions and time away from football affected both his playing career and earnings.Aldon Smith was born in Kansas City, Missouri, on September 25, 1989. After a strong college career at the University of Missouri, he entered the 2011 NFL Draft and was selected seventh overall by the San Francisco 49ers.His impact was immediate. Smith recorded 14 sacks during his rookie season and finished second in Defensive Rookie of the Year voting. A year later, he delivered the best season of his career.In 2012, Smith registered 19.5 sacks, setting a single-season San Francisco 49ers franchise record. He earned Pro Bowl and First-Team All-Pro honors while helping the team reach Super Bowl XLVII. During his first two NFL seasons, he collected 33.5 sacks and quickly became one of the league’s biggest defensive stars.Smith signed NFL contracts worth more than $34 million during his career. Because of suspensions, missed seasons and releases, his actual career earnings were lower. According to salary records, he earned $19,507,286 during his time in the league.Most of that money came from his years with the San Francisco 49ers. The team signed him to a fully guaranteed four-year rookie contract worth $14.384 million after selecting him in the first round of the 2011 draft.His career earnings by team were:One of his biggest paydays came in 2011 when he earned more than $9.3 million, largely because of his signing bonus. He later signed a one-year deal with the Oakland Raiders and eventually returned to the NFL with the Dallas Cowboys in 2020 after spending more than four years away from regular-season football.While Smith’s talent on the field was undeniable, off-field issues repeatedly interrupted his career. Between 2012 and 2021, he faced several legal problems and NFL suspensions. The 49ers released him in 2015 following another arrest related to driving under the influence.His suspension kept him out of regular-season NFL action from 2016 through 2019. Still, Smith managed an unexpected comeback in 2020 with the Dallas Cowboys, appearing in all 16 games and recording five sacks.After a short stint with the Seattle Seahawks in 2021, Smith stepped away from football. In 2023, he announced that he was finished playing.Later, he focused on helping younger athletes. In 2024, he launched a mentorship project called “I.M. Loading,” which aimed to guide athletes dealing with pressure, money, fame and personal struggles. He also worked with rookie players from the Jacksonville Jaguars and Las Vegas Raiders.The San Francisco 49ers, in their statement after his death, remembered Smith for his remarkable talent and the impact he made during his early years in the NFL.
Article Summary: Aldon smith was once one of the nfl’s most feared pass rushers and earned millions during his career. However, repeated suspensions and time away from football affected both his playing career and earnings. The san francisco 49ers confirmed his death on june 13, 2026, but no cause was immediately announced.

Article Title: Did Taylor Swift's ex boyfriend Joe Alwyn start a new romance with Ariana Grande just before the pop star's wedding to Travis Kelce?
Article Text:
Did Taylor Swift's ex boyfriend Joe Alwyn start a new romance with Ariana Grande just before the pop star's wedding to Travis Kelce?(Image via Getty Images)

Is Taylor Swift’s ex boyfriend Joe Alwyn dating Ariana Grande just days before the pop star marries Travis Kelce?



Joe Alwyn shares what he felt after Taylor Swift ended things with him as she gears up to marry Travis Kelce



Taylor Swift and her future husband, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player and popular tight end, Travis Kelce are just days away from tying the knot but it seems her ex boyfriend, Joe Alwyn has dominated headlines since the last few days.While the popular actor Joe Alwyn likes to keep things private in his life, a recent rumor about him romancing pop star Ariana Grande has sparked chaos.No, the rumor is entirely false and the story has been completely fabricated.For the unversed, a few hours ago, a parody account on X made a post that read as, “Ariana Grande and Joe Alwyn are reportedly dating.”This has sparked chaos as many have accused Joe Alwyn of being “jealous” of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s lavish wedding.A fan posted, “Joe seems to love problematic women. It is no surprise Ariana moved on so fast. She always does. Usually monkey branching before she breaks up but how did she even meet him?”Another fan wrote, “Oh wow, another 'report' from the 'sources close to the situation' who also told us she's marrying Pete Davidson again next week. Joe finally escaped the TS cinematic universe just to speedrun Thank U, Next: The Sequel.”While other fans have also been able to debunk the fake post. A fan joked, “This has to be untrue, joe is not in a dedicated relationship with some other woman, why would ariana date a single,available guy?”Another fan posted, “No way her and Ethan just broke up plus I don’t think she’d date Taylor’s ex when they’re friends…”However, neither Joe Alwyn nor Ariana Grande has addressed the fake rumors about their romance yet.While Taylor Swift seems deeply in love with Travis Kelce as she remains distant from Joe Alwyn, the popular actor spoke about their break up.Last year as he spoke to The Guardian, Joe Alwyn said, “I have great family and friends and real things in my life; those are the things that kept me tethered to the ground…So I don’t know how else to say it, it’s… just in a different room.”
Article Summary: Taylor swift and her future husband, the kansas city chiefs’ star player and popular tight end, travis kelce are just days away from tying the knot. A parody account on x made a post that read as, “ariana grande and joe alwyn are reportedly dating” this has sparked chaos as many have accused alwyn of being “jealous” of taylor swift’s lavish wedding.

Article Title: Fact check: Are LeBron James and his wife Savannah James getting divorced amid rumors of a strained relationship?
Article Text:
Are LeBron James and his wife Savannah James getting divorced amid rumors of a strained relationship?(Image via Getty Images)

Are LeBron James and his wife, Savannah James, separating after being together for over two decades?



LeBron James has often spoken about how Savannah James turned out to be the biggest source of strength and support to him.



The Los Angeles Lakers’ star player LeBron James has often been public about how his wife, Savannah James, has supported and been there for him through all the challenging phases of his career.While their love story has inspired billions around the world, a rumor about their divorce has sparked chaos.No, the NBA legend LeBron James and his wife, Savannah James, are not getting divorced as the rumor seems to be a fake post.For the unversed, a parody page on X made a post that read as, “LeBron James and Savannah are reportedly getting a divorce.”The post has now sparked chaos among fans as many are shocked by this news.A fan posted, “Why are they getting divorced? They should stay married. What God has joined together let no man put asunder…”Another fan wrote, “Women love to leave the marriage soon there athletic husband about to retire now they're looking for the back door for divorce SMH…”A third fan wrote, “Once their career is rounding up, their once lovely wives always manage to seek for divorce. Coincidental??, he'll no. They re always there for the bag using kids as alibi…”But other fans have been able to debunk the fake rumor and seem to be furious at the parody page.A fan posted, “You know misinformation like this is hot gist. But it’s just crazy that you could get sued. Btw who’s gonna divorce lord LeBron the goat??”Another fan wrote, “Leave this couple alone!!!! This is NO one business but theirs. I wish them well n may GOD be with them. I pray it’s not true…”Neither LeBron James nor his wife, Savannah James, has responded to the speculations about their marriage yet.A few months ago, in the Netflix documentary, “Starting 5”, LeBron James said, “You get lost in your own journey because you're trying to push the limit, push the throttle, see how far you can go…Oh, sh—t, that's the sky? What's beyond that? I'm trying to go past that. While you're on that trajectory, at times, you're looking down and like, 'Oh, sh—t, my family's down there.' And they're like, 'Go!' Savannah is like, 'Go, f—k it, go. We know you coming back. Fu—k. Just go! I got Bronny, I got Bryce, I got Zhuri.'"
Article Summary: Nba legend lebron james and his wife, savannah james, are not getting divorced as the rumor seems to be a fake post. A parody page on x made a post that read as, “lebron james and savannah are reportedly getting a divorce.” the post has now sparked chaos among fans as many are shocked by this news.

Article Title: Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito breaks silence about their romance rumors just days ahead of him taking the field
Article Text:
Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito breaks silence about their romance rumors just days ahead of him taking the field.(Image via Getty Images)

Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito shares what she feels about the lack of privacy



Kylian Mbappé speaks out on the pressure he is facing for World Cup 2026



Real Madrid star player Kylian Mbappé’s personal life has dominated headlines even as the star player eyes a World Cup win for his nation.While both Kylian Mbappé and his girlfriend, Ester Expósito, have stayed silent about their relationship, the popular Spanish actress has opened up about the lack of privacy in her life.A few hours ago, in an interview with the French newspaper, Le Parisien, Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito opened up about it and said, "I'm getting used to it..”The popular actress added, "Since Elite, it's been the same every time something happens in my private life.”Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito continued, “I don't like it because I'm a very private person…"While Kylian Mbappé has not responded to Ester Expósito’s comments, he has gotten brutally trolled in the last few weeks for their romance.Unverified rumors of Kylian Mbappé leaving the French camp to spend time with his girlfriend, Ester Expósito, in Madrid have sparked outrage among fans.However, the truth is that the two had gone on a vacation last month and not recently. But the Real Madrid star player Kylian Mbappé has remained silent about it and has stayed away from defending himself in public.As France gears up for the first match in World Cup 2026, all eyes remain on Kylian Mbappé and if he will be able to give his best on the field this time.A few days ago, in an interview with the Irish Examiner, Kylian Mbappé opened up about the pressure he is facing this time since he is the captain of the team.The Real Madrid star player said, "But I'm ready for that, ready to lead my team to the biggest stage game, and I hope that we are gonna go back with the trophy in Paris and in the Champs-Elysees.Kylian Mbappé continued, “I think when you play, you don't think about the legacy. You think about to perform, and to bring the trophy home. If we win, and if I win, it's gonna be insane for the legacy of the country and my legacy, for sure.”As Kylian Mbappé eyes the World Cup win, many are excited to watch Ester Expósito cheer him on this time.
Article Summary: Kylian mbappé’s girlfriend ester expósito breaks silence about their romance rumors just days ahead of him taking the field. The popular spanish actress has opened up about the lack of privacy in her life. A few hours ago, in an interview with the french newspaper, le parisien, kylian mb appé‘s girlfriend said, "i'm getting used to it..”

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Patriots linked to land Giants’ $31 million pass rusher in surprising offseason shakeup
Article Text:
NFL trade Rumors (Getty Images)

Is Kayvon Thibodeaux the edge rusher the Patriots should target?

Kayvon Thibodeaux’s name is back in trade discussions after a recent proposal linked the New York Giants edge rusher to the New England Patriots. The idea, floated by Bleacher Report’s Gary Davenport, suggests New England could send a conditional 2027 third-round pick to acquire the former No. 5 overall selection. While there is no indication a deal is imminent, the proposal has generated attention because of Thibodeaux’s age, pedigree, and the Patriots’ need for help off the edge. At 25, he remains one of the more intriguing bounce-back candidates in the NFL despite an injury-plagued stretch over the past two seasons.The logic behind the proposed move is easy to understand. New England enters 2026 with questions at edge rusher, and Thibodeaux offers a combination of upside and experience that is difficult to find at a reasonable trade cost.Davenport argued that the Patriots should be aggressive in pursuing pass-rush help.“Of course, if the Giants can get a better deal than the compensatory pick the team will get when (Kayvon) Thibodeaux all but certainly leaves in 2027 in free agency, it could be another story,” Davenport wrote. “The Patriots have already pushed their chips into the middle of the table with the A.J. Brown trade.”He went a step further, adding: “For the opportunity to bolster the pass rush, New England might as well mortgage the future a little bit more.And while Thibodeaux had a down 2025, we are talking about a 25-year-old former top-five pick with an 11.5-sack season on his NFL resume.”That upside is what makes the discussion interesting. Thibodeaux has not consistently built on the promise he showed earlier in his career. Injuries have limited his availability, costing him 12 games over the last two seasons. Production has dipped as well, with only eight combined sacks since his breakout campaign.Still, the Patriots have reasons to explore every available option. Harold Landry III dealt with injuries during stretches of the 2025 season, while rookie Gabe Jacas has yet to establish himself. During spring practices, New England relied heavily on Dre'Mont Jones, Elijah Ponder, Bradyn Swinson and Jesse Luketa. Adding another proven edge defender would provide much-needed depth and insurance.The bigger obstacle may be New York's willingness to negotiate. ESPN's Adam Schefter previously reported that the Giants “never came close to trading Thibodeaux during the NFL draft,” a sign that the organization still views him as an important piece of its future.For now, the proposal remains hypothetical. Yet it highlights an interesting question facing both franchises: whether the Giants should cash in on Thibodeaux's value now or continue betting that his best football is still ahead.
Article Summary: A recent proposal linked the new york giants edge rusher to the new england patriots. The idea suggests new england could send a conditional 2027 third-round pick to acquire the former no. 5 overall selection. At 25, he remains one of the more intriguing bounce-back candidates in the nfl.

Article Title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Uruguay players stopped for sniffer dog luggage checks; Manuel Ugarte’s reaction goes viral
Article Text:
FIFA World Cup 2026: Uruguay players stopped for sniffer dog luggage checks; Manuel Ugarte’s reaction goes viral (Image via Getty)

Manuel Ugarte’s reaction becomes the center of attention

Uruguay security checks divide opinion among football fans

Uruguay’s arrival in the United States ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup has sparked plenty of discussion online after a short video showed players waiting through security checks while sniffer dogs inspected their luggage. The clip, shared by Manchester United-focused X account @utdreport, quickly drew attention not only because of the visible security measures but also because of Manchester United midfielder Manuel Ugarte’s reaction. Standing with his arms crossed as officials checked bags beside the team bus, Ugarte appeared far from impressed, turning a routine moment into one of the tournament’s first viral talking points.The 12-second video shows Uruguay’s squad gathered outside near a bus with suitcases lined up on the pavement. Security personnel moved through the luggage while a sniffer dog was led around the bags as part of the inspection process. Most players waited quietly, but many viewers focused on Manuel Ugarte.Wearing a white T-shirt, dark trousers and white shoes, the midfielder stood with his arms crossed and a facial expression that many interpreted as annoyed or exhausted.That reaction became the main attraction of the post, which read: “Uruguay arrived in the United States for the World Cup and were greeted by sniffer dogs and full security checks. Look at Manuel Ugarte’s face 😂”.Replies quickly filled with jokes, memes and screenshots of Ugarte’s expression. Some fans said the midfielder looked like someone who simply wanted the process to end, while others joked that he perfectly captured how people feel after a long journey.The video arrived shortly after Uruguay dealt with travel problems before reaching the United States. Reports indicated that the team’s charter flight from Cancún, Mexico, was delayed because of permit-related issues, leaving the squad with less than 24 hours before its opening World Cup match against Saudi Arabia.That background added another layer to the discussion. Some viewers criticised the visible checks, arguing that international athletes should not have to go through inspections in public areas near team transport. Others pushed back, noting that luggage screening and sniffer dogs are standard security measures for international arrivals and major sporting events in the United States.As the debate continued, one thing remained clear: a routine security procedure, combined with World Cup excitement and Manuel Ugarte’s memorable expression, was enough to create one of the tournament’s most talked-about social media moments.
Article Summary: Uruguay players stopped for sniffer dog luggage checks. Manuel ugarte’s reaction becomes the center of attention on social media. Video shows players waiting through security checks while sniffer dogs inspected their luggage. Manchester united-focused x account @utdreport shared clip.
